title: Surrogate Methodology PASS: corrected null design with 7 domains confirmed

null_design.description: Real targets held constant; only QCI is recomputed from surrogate signals

circular_null_problem.description: Original design randomized both QCI and targets, inflating null baseline
circular_null_problem.resolution: Fix real targets; randomize QCI only; compare to fixed-target baseline

_note: Added EMG 2026-07-05 audit: this list was stale, missing EMG (cert [171], confirmed 2/2 surrogates beaten this same cycle) even though a later domain (ERA5) was already present. Cross-checked against [174]/[175]'s sibling domain lists, which had the opposite gap (missing ERA5 instead).
